interfaces.name: getHomeOverview
interfaces.description: Get homepage overview including product value messaging, key setup stats, quick links, and suggested next steps for a single admin user.

interfaces.name: getBotsOverview
interfaces.description: List existing bots with status, channel, and basic performance indicators for the Bots page.

interfaces.name: getBotBuilderState
interfaces.description: Initialize the bot builder for creating a new bot or editing an existing one, including channels, templates, offline messages, and knowledge base options.

parameters.name: botId
parameters.description: If provided, load this bot into the builder for editing.

bot.description: Existing bot configuration or null for a new bot.

interfaces.name: createOrUpdateBotBasics
interfaces.description: Set or update basic bot properties such as name, type, channel, greeting message, and optional template.

parameters.name: botId
parameters.description: If omitted, a new bot draft is created.

interfaces.name: configureBotTargetingRules
interfaces.description: Configure audience targeting rules for a bot, including base audience and conditions like country equals United States.

interfaces.name: configureBotFlow
interfaces.description: Design or update the bot conversation flow, including sequential questions, required fields, and conditional actions like routing high-budget leads to a specific inbox.

interfaces.name: configureBotAvailabilityAndBehavior
interfaces.description: Configure bot availability, business hours, timezone, offline message, and repeat behavior such as 'show bot to new visitors only' and 'repeat after' days.

parameters.name: repeatAfterDays
parameters.description: Days before showing the bot again to the same visitor.

interfaces.name: configureBotKnowledgeBaseUsage
interfaces.description: Enable or disable knowledge base as a content source for a bot and set preferred answer source ordering.

interfaces.name: activateBot
interfaces.description: Activate or deactivate a bot and persist the final configuration.

interfaces.name: getAutomationsOverview
interfaces.description: Display existing automations with status, triggers, and last updated information for the Automations page.

interfaces.name: getAutomationEditorState
interfaces.description: Initialize the automation editor for creating or editing an automation rule, including channels, email templates, and existing rule configuration.

interfaces.name: saveAutomationRule
interfaces.description: Create or update an automation rule including trigger, conditions, actions like AI reply generation, wait steps, and email sending details.

interfaces.name: toggleAutomationStatus
interfaces.description: Toggle an automation rule between active and inactive from the Automations list.

interfaces.name: getRoutingRulesOverview
interfaces.description: List routing rules with status, schedule, scope, and order for the Routing Rules page.

interfaces.name: getRoutingRuleEditorState
interfaces.description: Initialize the routing rule editor for creating or editing a routing rule, including available inboxes.

interfaces.name: saveRoutingRule
interfaces.description: Create or update a routing rule with condition groups, branch actions to assign inbox and priority, and evaluation settings.

conditionGroupIndex.description: Index of the condition group this branch applies to.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Position in routing rule evaluation order.

interfaces.name: reorderRoutingRules
interfaces.description: Update the global evaluation order of routing rules.

interfaces.name: toggleRoutingRuleStatus
interfaces.description: Activate or deactivate a routing rule from the Routing Rules list.

interfaces.name: getAnalyticsDashboard
interfaces.description: Display pinned analytics widgets including AI performance and conversation metrics for the Analytics Dashboard.

interfaces.name: getAnalyticsReportBuilderState
interfaces.description: Initialize the analytics report builder, loading an existing report if provided and exposing available metrics and group-by options.

interfaces.name: saveAnalyticsReport
interfaces.description: Create or update an analytics report definition, including metrics, date range, filters like AI coverage, grouping, sorting, and optional pinning to the dashboard.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: ISO datetime string if dateRangeType is 'custom'.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: ISO datetime string if dateRangeType is 'custom'.

interfaces.name: updateDashboardWidgetLayout
interfaces.description: Update the position and size of a pinned analytics widget on the dashboard grid.

interfaces.name: getIntegrationsOverview
interfaces.description: List available integrations including Demo CRM Sandbox with their connection status for the Integrations page.

interfaces.name: getIntegrationConfigState
interfaces.description: Load integration configuration details and mapping options for a specific integration such as Demo CRM Sandbox.

interfaces.name: configureCrmIntegration
interfaces.description: Connect and configure a CRM integration including API key, environment, field mappings, and sync options.

interfaces.name: getKnowledgeBaseOverview
interfaces.description: List knowledge bases and high-level stats for the Knowledge Base section.

interfaces.name: getKnowledgeBaseArticles
interfaces.description: List existing knowledge base articles for a given knowledge base with their visibility and status.

interfaces.name: createOrUpdateKnowledgeBaseArticle
interfaces.description: Create a new or update an existing knowledge base article including title, content, visibility, keywords, and status.

interfaces.name: getKnowledgeBaseSettingsState
interfaces.description: Load knowledge base settings controlling AI answer usage for the Knowledge Base Settings page.

interfaces.name: updateKnowledgeBaseSettings
interfaces.description: Enable or disable using the knowledge base for AI answers and set the preferred source ordering, applying settings to bots if desired.

interfaces.name: getUsersAndTeamOverview
interfaces.description: View the list of users (agents) and available inboxes for the Users & Team page.

interfaces.name: inviteAgent
interfaces.description: Invite a new agent user with role, inbox access restrictions, permissions, and optional custom working hours.

interfaces.name: getInboxSettings
interfaces.description: Load settings for a specific inbox including default priority and assigned team members.

interfaces.name: updateInboxTeamMembers
interfaces.description: Update the list of agents assigned to a given inbox.

interfaces.name: getPricingPlans
interfaces.description: Retrieve pricing plans for the Pricing page filtered by billing type, including AI features and seat counts.

interfaces.name: startTrialForPlan
interfaces.description: Begin the trial signup flow for a selected pricing plan, returning plan details and a new trial signup record.

interfaces.name: submitTrialSignupForm
interfaces.description: Submit trial signup details for the selected plan, including company info, contact details, and AI feature usage.

interfaces.name: getSettingsHubOverview
interfaces.description: Provide an overview of key configuration statuses for the Settings Hub, including routing, CRM, and knowledge base AI usage.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Retrieve content for the About page including mission, story, credibility indicators, and customer stats.

interfaces.name: getContactInfo
interfaces.description: Display contact details for the Contact page including emails, office locations, and support channels.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a simple contact form for sales or general inquiries from the Contact page.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateDraftBot
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load an existing bot draft or create a new draft record for the current single-user workspace.

helperFunctions.name: _applyConditionGroupsToOwner
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist condition groups and conditions for a given owner entity such as targeting_rule, routing_rule, or analytics_report.

helperFunctions.name: _resolveCheapestPlanUnderConstraints
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute the cheapest pricing plan that satisfies constraints like billing type, max price, ai inclusion, and minimum seats.

helperFunctions.name: _pinReportToDashboardInternal
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create or update a DashboardWidget for a given AnalyticsReport and default it to the next available position.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateHomeOverviewStats
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to aggregate counts of active bots, automations, routing rules, and connected integrations for the home overview.
